hyperedges.label: Compass 'lens, not a judge' neutrality enforced across surfaces
Invariant gate left untouched across all feature specs
Lens-not-judge: reliability tiers attach to sources only, never creators
Shared design system foundations (tokens, components, handoff)
Lens-not-a-judge compass shared across concept, spec, UX and user docs
Invariant gate / 'nothing ships that can't show its work' enforced and explained across code and user docs
Persona-driven audience segmentation across target audience and stakeholder deck

nodes.label: f-Socials UX/UI Design & Interactive Report Workspace (mockup)
nodes.norm_label: f-socials ux/ui design & interactive report workspace (mockup)

nodes.label: Lens, not a judge (compass principle)
nodes.rationale: Reframes the product from an omniscient truth judge to a lens that shows how content is built, simultaneously resolving legal (defamation) risk, the backfire effect, and the neutrality problem; every product/legal/UX/technical decision answers to it.

nodes.label: The invariant gate (lens-not-judge gate)
nodes.rationale: A report reaches 'ready' only if no claim asserts an evidence strength it cannot cite (none + zero citations is a valid honest state), every framing signal has an evidenced quote, confidence clears the floor, and >=1 claim was extracted; codified in core/assemble.ts as the moat. If a feature requires weakening it, the feature is wrong.

nodes.label: Claim Ledger
nodes.rationale: Replaces the single Truth Score with per-claim verifiability, evidence strength, source basis, confidence and citations, because a machine truth verdict triggers the backfire effect and defamation exposure.

nodes.label: Framing Signals (framing-as-inoculation)
nodes.rationale: Names persuasion techniques tied to the exact triggering quote; naming the technique in context is the inoculation payload, never shown without inspectable evidence.

nodes.label: Bridging perspective selection rule
nodes.rationale: Perspectives chosen by an explicit testable rule (topic match, moderate divergence band, Tier2+ evidence, low dehumanization) to prevent false balance rather than 'show the opposite'.

nodes.label: Source & tier policy (open signals)
nodes.rationale: Transparent, versioned tiering from open signals (IFCN, institutional domain suffixes, press councils) attaches to sources/citations only, never to a creator; credibility is about accountability and evidence, not ideology.

nodes.label: Claim-verification-router (precision evidence pipeline)
nodes.rationale: Six-stage normalize->triage->query-pack->retrieve->validate->outcome router cites only evidence matching the original claim; governing metric is False Evidence Rate because a wrong citation is worse than a missing one.

nodes.label: HART Score (Honesty, Accountability, Responsibility, Transparency)
nodes.source_file: Strategic Licensing/Strategic Licensing Analysis for the f-Socials Media Literacy Pipeline.md
nodes.rationale: Licensing choices (MBFC, AllSides, Ad Fontes, NewsGuard) map onto the four HART dimensions to build an institutional moat.

nodes.label: Feed Friction Dial (Wedge B north star)
nodes.rationale: A feed-reranking dial to dial down antidemocratic/animosity content; kept internal and gated because reranking moves f-Socials into an intervention system the DSA treats as a regulated surface — earn trust read-only first.
nodes.norm_label: feed friction dial (wedge b north star)

nodes.label: Cache-first unit economics
nodes.rationale: Hashing each input means a viral video is analyzed once and served to everyone from cache, socializing the LLM/transcription cost so the free public tier survives and feeds the institutional funnel.

nodes.label: Query pack (multi-variant claim retrieval)
nodes.rationale: Generate 4-8 purpose-distinct query variants per claim and separate broad recall retrieval from strict precision validation, so retrieval can be broad while only same-claim candidates become evidence.

nodes.label: False Evidence Rate (governing metric)
nodes.rationale: The most important metric is not recall but false evidence rate — a missed citation is annoying, a wrong citation is reputational cyanide.

nodes.label: WCAG 2.2 AA accessibility
nodes.rationale: Color is never the only signal, 44x44 touch targets, visible focus, ARIA wiring; full conformance still needs manual AT review beyond automated checks.

nodes.label: Trust_Gate (per-capability intervention gate)
nodes.rationale: Each intervention-and-scale capability is gated on Citation_Coverage + Model_Human_Agreement thresholds plus a legal-review flag, re-evaluated live, fail-closed, dark by default.

nodes.label: Three evidence outcomes (first-class states)
nodes.rationale: Matched evidence / relevant context only / no sufficient evidence are explicit backend states, keeping the lens posture and preventing the UI from implying every source verifies a claim; 'no sufficient evidence found' is a successful behavior.

nodes.label: Social & UI Icon Sprite (Bluesky, Discord, GitHub, X, social, documentation)
nodes.norm_label: social & ui icon sprite (bluesky, discord, github, x, social, documentation)

hyperedges.label: Compass 'lens, not a judge' neutrality enforced across surfaces
Invariant gate left untouched across all feature specs
Lens-not-judge: reliability tiers attach to sources only, never creators
Shared design system foundations (tokens, components, handoff)
Lens-not-a-judge compass shared across concept, spec, UX and user docs
Invariant gate / 'nothing ships that can't show its work' enforced and explained across code and user docs
Persona-driven audience segmentation across target audience and stakeholder deck
